---
title: "Orion Jordan"
about: 
    image: orion.jpg
    template: trestles
    links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/OrionJordan
    - icon: youtube
      text: Youtube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5EJ87vBGbDq5DnzUnRj1AA
    - icon: stack-overflow
      text: Math Exchange
      href: https://math.stackexchange.com/users/1063903/orion-jordan
css: styles.css
---

::: {.column-page}

## Bio

Undergraduate student at the University of North Texas,
majoring in mathematics.

## Website

This is my attempt at a good looking website giving math notes in a format that resembles formal mathematics. The goal is to have each section start with a list of axioms, and build them into some subject. Along with this some miscellaneous math projects, like my preparation for the integration bee, will be hosted here!
